mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NOTI_NO, MEMBER_NO, NOTI_TYPE, NOTI_TITLE, NOTI_CONTENT, NOTI_LINK, IS_READ, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND IS_READ = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION (NOTI_NO, MEMBER_NO, NOTI_TYPE, NOTI_TITLE, NOTI_CONTENT, NOTI_LINK) VALUES (SEQ_NOTI.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{notiType}, #{notiTitle}, #{notiContent}, #{notiLink})
